analysis.executive_summary: Audit of docs.cohere.com crawled 220 pages with 100% coverage of discovered scope (223 pages). Documentation contains 16 confirmed broken internal links affecting user-facing content. API reference coverage stands at 55.56% across 78 detected API pages. Example code reliability scored 0.0%, and only 16.82% of pages display last-updated metadata. SEO/geo issues affect 25.23% of pages, indicating significant discoverability and localization gaps.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved (100%) within discovered scope
No repository navigation link breakage detected
API page detection successful with 78 pages identified and 85% detection confidence
Overall audit confidence at 78.17% provides reliable baseline
Single-product topology simplifies maintenance and governance
risks: 16 broken internal links in user-facing documentation degrade user experience and trust
API reference coverage at 55.56% leaves nearly half of API surface undocumented or orphaned
Example code reliability at 0.0% suggests no executable validation or testing infrastructure
Only 16.82% freshness visibility prevents users from assessing content currency
SEO/geo issue rate of 25.23% significantly impairs search discoverability and international reach
8 unverified links due to auth/rate-limit blocks may hide additional broken references
Link verification confidence at 61.67% indicates moderate uncertainty in link health assessment

prioritized_actions.action: Repair all 16 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing documentation
Implement automated example code testing to raise reliability from 0.0% to measurable threshold
Audit and document missing API endpoints to increase coverage from 55.56% to 85%+
Add last-updated timestamps to all pages (currently 16.82% coverage)
Resolve SEO/geo issues affecting 25.23% of pages (meta tags, descriptions, localization)

limitations: External audit cannot verify content accuracy, technical correctness, or completeness of explanations
8 links blocked by authentication or rate-limiting could not be verified and may include additional broken references
Example reliability at 0.0% may indicate detection limitations rather than actual code quality if examples exist but are not machine-testable
Crawl discovered only 223 pages; undiscoverable or unlisted content outside navigation is not assessed
API coverage measurement depends on heuristic detection; actual API surface may differ from detected pages
